---
title: "Data Exploration for capstone-project-Beiwko"
author: Benon Okwi
  - name: "Benon Okwi"
    orcid: "0009-0005-4173-3395"
    email: "beok8551l@colorado.edu"
    affiliation:
      - name: "University of Colorado Boulder"
        department: "Department of Civil, Environmental and Architectural Engineering"
        city: "Boulder"
        state: "CO"
        country: "USA"
date: Jul 3, 2026
format: html
editor: visual
---
